title: Tricky Trials +
description: This mod expands on minecraft 1.21 adding features we think fit the update
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0aca78fc7144198ede940e56dbb49286483fed98.png)

Do you think the 1.21 Tricky Trials update didn't add enough, Well this mod is for you!

 

In this mod we plan to expand on Minecraft 1.21 with features players wanted as well as features that just fit the update

 

The First update comes with a new Structure, The Ominous Trial Chamber, new vault blocks and even a new BOSS

You can check out everytime added in V:1 here - <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5RlubODUkLE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![key art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc80b83d8aaaa5af5acfa3dd966ecc1043316255.png)

If you have suggestions for possible future features let us know! The best place is in Belgie's Discord under the suggestions forum! - [Join Belgie's Discord](https://discord.gg/C9jkQda)

 

Huge Thanks to Centauri and TheBlockyGoat for helping with the mod you can check them out below

[Check out TheBlockyGoat](https://www.youtube.com/@TheBlockyGoat_Studios/featured)

[Check out Centauri](https://www.youtube.com/@CentauriTheFreak)
